Table of Contents

Interface INetworkSourceDirections

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to the properties for generating directions for a specific network dataset source.

[Guid("DFE6C801-152D-4D0F-B3AA-54331384D777")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface INetworkSourceDirections

Properties

AdminAreaFieldName

The name of the field containing the administrative area information for generating directions.

string AdminAreaFieldName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

FeatureNameFields

The fields containing the names used in reporting directions.

IArray FeatureNameFields { get; set; }

Property Value

IArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

FieldMappings

The collection of directions field mapping.

IArray FieldMappings { get; set; }

Property Value

IArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

LandmarkEventSources

The collection of DirectionsLandmarkSource items used to generate event bypass instructions.

IArray LandmarkEventSources { get; set; }

Property Value

IArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

LandmarkManeuverSources

The collection of DirectionsLandmarkSource items used to improve maneuver guidance.

IArray LandmarkManeuverSources { get; set; }

Property Value

IArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

Shields

The directions shields settings for this source.

IShields Shields { get; set; }

Property Value

IShields
